zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Gilbert Kennedy of Dunure於1348年1月1日出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾登努時，他的父親Sir John Kennedy Of Dunure38歲，母親Mary DeCarrick28歲。他於1380年之後與Agnes Maxwell在蘇格蘭艾斯爾馬波爾結婚。他們至少是10個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1408年11月8日在他的家鄉享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Gilbert Kennedy of Dunure于1348年1月1日出生在苏格兰艾斯爾登努时，他的父亲Sir John Kennedy Of Dunure38岁，母亲Mary DeCarrick28岁。他于1380年之后与Agnes Maxwell在苏格兰艾斯爾馬波爾结婚。他们至少是10个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1408年11月8日在他的家乡享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kennedy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Ceannéidigh ‘descendant of Ceannéidigh’ (from ceann ‘head’ + éidigh ‘ugly’); or from the Scottish Gaelic Mac Cinnèidigh, consisting of mac ‘son’ with an equivalent name. Compare Canaday , Cannady , Cannedy , Kannady , and Kenedy .

History: Kennedy ancestral lands are found both in Ireland and in Scotland, where the family's medieval ancestral seat is sited on the Ayrshire coast, facing the Irish Sea. — The great-grandparents of President John Fitzgerald Kennedy (1917–63) came to North America as immigrants from Ireland in the 1840s. His paternal great-grandparents were Patrick Kennedy (1823–58), born in Dunganstown, County Wexford, Ireland, and Bridget Murphy, who was born probably in Owenduff, County Wexford, Ireland c. 1827; they came to Boston, MA, in 1849. His maternal great-grandparents were Thomas Fitzgerald (1823–85), who was born in Bruff, County Limerick, Ireland, and Rose Anna Cox, who was born probably in Tomregan or Kinawley, County Cavan, Ireland, c. 1835; they came to Boston, MA, in 1857. — An early Scottish Kennedy forebear of a quite different family was British colonial official Archibald Kennedy (1685–1763), the son of Alexander Kennedy of Craigoch, who emigrated to NY c. 1710.

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Gilbert Kennedy of Dunure was born on 1 January 1348, in Dunure, Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, Sir John Kennedy Of Dunure, was 38 and his mother, Mary DeCarrick, was 28. He married Agnes Maxwell after 1380, in Maybole, Ayrshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 10 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 8 November 1408, in his hometown, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Gilbert Kennedy of Dunure est né le 1 janvier 1348, à Dunure, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Sir John Kennedy Of Dunure, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Mary DeCarrick, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Maxwell après 1380, à Maybole, Ayrshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 10 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 8 novembre 1408, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Gilbert Kennedy of Dunure am 1. Januar 1348 in Dunure, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Kennedy Of Dunure 38 und seine Mutter Mary DeCarrick 28. Er hat nach 1380 in Maybole, Ayrshire, Scotland Agnes Maxwell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 10 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 8. November 1408 im Alter von 60 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gilbert Kennedy of Dunure è nato il il 1 gennaio 1348 nel Dunure, Ayrshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir John Kennedy Of Dunure, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Mary DeCarrick, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Maxwell dopo il 1380, nel Maybole, Ayrshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 10 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 8 novembre 1408, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Gilbert Kennedy of Dunureが1348年1月1日にスコットランドエイルシュアイアダヌアで生まれた時，父Sir John Kennedy Of Dunureは38歳，母Mary DeCarrickは28歳であった。1380年以後にスコットランドエイルシュアイアメイボルでAgnes Maxwellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも10人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1408年11月8日に故郷で60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Gilbert Kennedy of Dunure(이)가 1348년 1월 1일 스컷랜드 에이르실르 던르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Kennedy Of Dunure(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary DeCarrick(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1380년 이후 스컷랜드 에이르실르 메이볼일에서 Agnes Maxwell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1408년 11월 8일 그의 고향에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.1 Jan 1348–8 Nov 1408: 1 de janeiro de 1348–8 de novembro de 1408
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Gilbert Kennedy of Dunure nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1348, em Dunure, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir John Kennedy Of Dunure, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Mary DeCarrick, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Maxwell após 1380, em Maybole, Ayrshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 10 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 8 de novembro de 1408, em sua cidade natal, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Gilbert Kennedy of Dunure родился 1 января 1348 г. в местности дунур, аиршир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir John Kennedy Of Dunure было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary DeCarrick, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Maxwell после 1380 г. в местности меибол, аиршир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 10 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 8 ноября 1408 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 60 лет.

es.1 Jan 1348–8 Nov 1408: 1 de enero de 1348–8 de noviembre de 1408
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Gilbert Kennedy of Dunure nació el 1 de enero de 1348, en Dunure, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir John Kennedy Of Dunure, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Mary DeCarrick, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Agnes Maxwell después de 1380, en Maybole, Ayrshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 10 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 8 de noviembre de 1408, en su pueblo, a la edad de 60 años.
